note: Engineer kit (§12). Constructs (Field Entities) approximated as Powers that tick each turn (turnStart). Gadgets (card-gen) approximated as energy/block. Block-scaling via Guard/Dexterity; Railgun scales with energy spent. Overdrive pays Block for energy. Tweak later.

cards.name: Wrench Strike
cards.artPrompt: "Wrench Strike": a goggled tinker-engineer unleashing a single brutal, focused offensive strike, rendered with raw kinetic force — dust, motion lines and steel-grey impact.

cards.name: Plating
cards.artPrompt: "Plating": a goggled tinker-engineer bracing behind a glowing wall of protective guard, rendered with raw kinetic force — dust, motion lines and steel-grey impact.
